channel.title: Game Industry on Hi everyone. It's me, Tim.
channel.description: Recent content in Game Industry on Hi everyone. It's me, Tim.

item.title: The Future Of Generative AI
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about the future of generative AI And already I know people’s hackles are rising.

item.title: Carefree To Careful
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about the game industry going from carefree to careful.

item.title: Great Developers
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about great developers.

item.title: Fences
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about fences.

item.title: Arguing About Games
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about arguing about games.

item.title: Game Developer Motivations
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about game developer motivations.

item.title: Why Are Modern Games So Big?
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim.

item.title: Insults and Backhanded Compliments
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about insults and backhanded compliments.

item.title: Why People Quit
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about why people quit.

item.title: Taking Risks
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about taking risks.

item.title: "Digital Stealing" And Fairness
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about digital stealing in quotes and fairness.

item.title: Industry Pendulum Swings
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about industry pendulum swings.

item.title: Gaming In The 1980s
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about gaming in the 1980s.

item.title: Games And Theater
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about video games and the theater.

item.title: Learning From Steam Data
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today, I want to talk about learning from Steam data.

item.title: A Christmas Poem By Ron Gilbert
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to do a little Christmas poem by Ron Gilbert.

item.title: Rising Game Budgets
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about Rising Game budgets.

item.title: Cultural Changes
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about cultural changes and I specifically want to get into eventually, because I’m going to tell some stories.

item.title: This Channel And The Game Industry
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about this Channel and the game industry, kind of a meta video, a video about my videos, kind of to put in perspective like what

item.title: PAX 2024
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about pxs 2024.

item.title: Capitalism
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about capitalism, but this is going to be a very rambling video and when I start it’s not going to sound like I’m talking about capitalism at all, but I am.

item.title: How The Internet Changed Game Dev
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about how did the internet change game development?

item.title: The Business Side Of Game Development
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about the business side of game development.

item.title: So You Want To Make Games?
item.description: It’s me, Tim, so you want to make games today?

item.title: Snapshots Through My Career
item.description: Hey everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I wanted to do something fun that I’m going to call snapshots through my career, and

item.title: Jobs, Careers, And Callings
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today, I want to talk about having a job versus a career, versus a calling.

item.title: Making A Demo
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about making a demo.

item.title: Industry Changes
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about industry changes because there have been a lot of stuff going on: a lot of layoffs recently, a lot of concern about AI taking jobs.

item.title: "It's A Terrible Time For Games"
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim.

item.title: The Missing R&D Department
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about the missing R&D department, and by R&D I mean research and development.

item.title: Discoverability
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. And today I want to talk about discoverability.

item.title: Technological Evolution
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about technological Evolution.

item.title: Why Aren't There More Channels Like This?
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. And today I want to talk about why there aren’t more game developers doing channels like this.

item.title: The Future Of Games
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about the future of games, like where I think games are going to go.

item.title: Data On My Games
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to look at data, specifically data for my own games.

item.title: School vs. Self-Taught
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about the pros and SC cons of going to school versus being self-taught.

item.title: It's A Great Time To Be A Game Player
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about why this is such an amazing time for game players doesn’t always seem that way, but I’m gonna lay it out.

item.title: The Decline Of Generalists
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. And today I want to talk about the decline of generalists, and I’ll describe what that is.

item.title: Virtual Reality
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me Tim. Can we talk about VR?

item.title: Career Summary 1981-2023
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to answer a question from asdfjk1227 who asks: can you do a resume video where you talk about every gaming project you did and then a couple, two short versions of interesting events or something, so we can get a better understanding of your experiences in one spot, like 67, 60 seconds per project or company maximum to get a high level?

item.title: Game Development: Then vs. Now
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to ask a question from, or answer a question — I keep doing that from — Jeremy Mason 9802 asks: do you think game development is harder or Worse nowadays compared to, say, the 90s, or is it better or the same?

item.title: Career Longevity
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about career longevity.

item.title: Work-Life Balance
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about my thoughts on work-life balance in the game industry.

item.title: Ageism In The Game Industry
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I want to talk about ageism in the game industry and that’s why I’m wearing a shirt which you may have noticed, is a little tight.

item.title: How to Get a Job in the Game Industry
item.description: Hi everyone. It’s me, Tim. Today I’m going to answer the most asked question I ever get, not just on this channel but at conventions, by email when people visit the studios I worked at friends, family.
